name: constipation
title: best herbal teas for constipation
description: Foeniculum vulgare tea contains bioactive constituents such as volatile oils, including anethole, limonene, and fenchone, which possess carminative and anti-inflammatory properties that help to alleviate constipation symptoms. The tea also exhibits laxative properties due to its high fiber content and ability to stimulate digestive enzymes, making it an effective natural remedy for constipation.
